case_title: ESPERANZA AVILA VS. A&M FOX LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVILA, ESPERANZA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT A&M FOX LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA SOURCE RESTAURANT $6,341.13 PRINCIPAL, $13.70 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,579.83, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
